title: Drill from ERD Node to Object Details
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want to drill from an entity node directly into the object detail page, so that I can inspect individual fields with minimal friction.
description:
## Context
Users viewing the conceptual ERD often need to inspect the full field list for a specific object. Currently they must navigate away manually.

## Behavior
Each object node in the ERD includes a hyperlink that navigates to the DataTools object detail page for that entity. Clicking the link opens the object details view where all fields, data types, and metadata are displayed.
acceptance_criteria: Each object node in the ERD contains a clickable hyperlink
Clicking the link navigates to the DataTools object detail page for that entity
Navigation preserves context so the user can return to the ERD
Link is visually indicated (e.g., underline or icon) without cluttering the node
ux_changes: Each ERD entity node includes a hyperlink to the DataTools object detail page, enabling drill-down navigation from the diagram.
implementation_notes: GoJS node template updated to include a clickable text block or icon that constructs the object detail URL from the node's object API name.
